purpose: 3D Nexa character poses for efeonce-think broken/expired-link fallback screens, one per fallback kind

engine.removeBackground: local IMG.LY AI matting via `pnpm ai:image:rmbg`

promptScaffold: Keep this EXACT 3D animated character (stylized Pixar-like 3D render) — identical identity, face, big expressive eyes, long dark wavy hair, gold hoop earrings, the same royal-blue hoodie with the same white rocket-in-orbit emblem on the chest, black tailored pants and black high heels, full body, same 3D cartoon style, materials and soft lighting. Change ONLY her pose and expression to: <DELTA>. Same full-body framing, centered. Plain solid white background.

items.delta: (reused source pose) surprised 'whoa', both hands raised
warm, empathetic and apologetic — a gentle shrug with both open hands lowered and turned slightly upward, a soft caring half-smile, as if to say 'sorry, this link expired'.

calm, serene and reassuring — standing relaxed with one hand gently resting over her heart and the other softly open at her side, a warm gentle closed-mouth smile, as if to say 'no problem, we'll sort it out'.
patient and friendly — one hand raised in a gentle 'hold on a moment' gesture (palm forward, relaxed), a calm reassuring smile, as if to say 'give it a second'.
a light apologetic 'oops' — one hand gently rubbing the back of her neck, a small awkward but warm friendly smile, slightly raised eyebrows, as if to say 'something broke on our side'.
